goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'london liverpool street' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should 'arrive by 11:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should depart from london liverpool street and should leave on wednesday
The train should arrive by 11:00 and should go to cambridge
